title: Decision Journal Schema
description: Schema skeleton for Decision Journal records generated from Review output. Decision Journal is downstream of the Daily Review Pipeline and is not an independent upstream record.
validation_notes: This schema is for Decision Journal records generated from Review output.
Decision Journal is not independently created before Review completion.
Pipeline order is Prediction -> Outcome -> Review -> Learning -> Decision Journal -> Candidate.
Decision Journal records must not directly change Theme Score, Stage Score, Decision Score, or production trading logic.
G-014 content should be written only after it is completed and approved.
This schema must not modify runtime, pipeline, Dashboard, or scoring.
